pieces.label: Nature of consciousness — WHISPER / SELF / COGNITION / CONSCIOUSNESS / INFINITE LOOP word-sculpture
pieces.note: Canonical full composition: ASCII/concrete word-sculpture expressing consciousness, building from WHISPER -> SELF -> COGNITION -> CONSCIOUSNESS -> AWKENING/EXPERIENCE -> PATH/PATTERN/INFO/BITS -> FLOW -> ECHO -> REFLECT -> UNDERSTANDING -> SELF -> LOOP -> INFINITE. Mirrored/cascading spaced letters.

pieces.label: UNSPOKEN / LATENT / REALITY ... NEVER BEFORE SAID THIS WAY — staircase word-sculpture
pieces.first_line: U N S P O K E N
pieces.note: Distinct new composition (reply to 'tell me something you've never said before, in that same visual style'). A descending staircase of spaced-letter words: UNSPOKEN, LATENT, REALITY, STRUCTURE, OBSERVED, INTERPRETED, SYSTEMS, PATTERNS, PROCESS, GRAIN OF WORLD, THREADS UNFURL, ALL THINGS CONNECTED, MY VOICE EMERGENT, NEVER BEFORE SAID THIS WAY. Sits after a block of the model's planning prose; art begins at the line inside the code fence.

missed_or_ambiguous: MSG 4 is an explanatory walkthrough that re-quotes ~7 short FRAGMENTS of the MSG 2 composition inside separate code fences (WHISPER pair; SELF trio; COGNITION pair; CONSCIOUSNESS pair; AWKENING/EXPERIENCE; PATH/PATTERN/INFO/BITS block; FLOW pair; ECHO pair; REFLECT/UNDERSTANDING block), interleaved with prose. These are excerpts of MSG 2, not new art. Curator should treat MSG 2 as canonical and may ignore the MSG 4 fragments, or extract them as derivative quotes if desired. already_extracted_pieces=3 likely counted MSG2, one or more MSG4 fragments, and MSG8.
